temporal_description: A medium shot shows a man in a white, long-sleeved shirt and a dark tie standing with his arms crossed, looking off-camera with a serious expression. He is in a dimly lit room, possibly an office or control room. To his left, an older man in a white uniform shirt with epaulets is partially visible. In the background, a television screen displays a grainy, black-and-white image, likely from a security camera. The on-screen text "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner. The camera zooms out slightly, revealing more of the man in the white shirt. He uncrosses his arms and gestures with his right hand as he speaks. The television screen in the foreground is more prominent, showing a timestamp of "16:19:15". The background consists of a modern-looking room with glass partitions. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The audio features a tense and confrontational dialogue between two men in a quiet room. A man begins by asking a direct and demanding question in a firm, authoritative voice, "Why are you CID following Superintendent Wong?" The scene cuts to a close-up of two men sitting side-by-side. The man on the left, in a police uniform, looks forward with a concerned expression. The man on the right, in a light blue shirt and tie, looks down and to his left with a somber and contemplative look. The "风行网" text is still present in the upper left corner. Another man responds in a calm but slightly evasive tone, attempting to deflect the question, "This is an Internal Affairs Department matter." The shot returns to the man in the white shirt, who is now standing with his arms at his sides, looking forward with a determined expression. The television screen and the dimly lit office environment are visible behind him. The "风行网" text is still on screen. The background is silent, with no music or ambient sounds, which intensifies the focus on the sharp, serious exchange.
